hero.imageAlt: Kayakers racing through whitewater rapids on the Ötztaler Ache

dasRennen.label: OETZ TROPHY
dasRennen.body: The Ötztaler Ache. WW V. One of the hardest kayak races in the Alps. Only those who make it through the qualifying rounds will be allowed to compete in the main event. The course demands experience, technique, and the willingness to push your limit.

festivalOverview.label: 17-20 September 2026
festivalOverview.body: The Ötztal Kayak Festival brings the paddling community together for four days in Oetz. Racing, demo boats, film screenings, music, and of course the Ötztaler Ache.

footer.tagline: Extreme Kayak Championships · Ötztaler Ache · Since 2019

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.liabilityText: Our website contains links to the websites of third parties. As the content of these websites is not under our control, we cannot assume any liability for such external content. The respective provider of the linked websites is solely responsible for their content.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: We, Source To Sea GmbH, Natterer See 1, 6161 Natters, Austria only collect, process and use your personal data with your consent or based on another legal basis in accordance with the GDPR. The provision of your data is required for your participation in the OETZ TROPHY.
datenschutz.s1Text: We only collect personal data that is necessary for the implementation, evaluation and optimisation of the OETZ TROPHY or that you have voluntarily provided to us. In particular, the following data will be processed: name, address, email address, telephone number, date of birth, age, gender, nationality, placement, club/association, and video recordings and photos.
datenschutz.s2Text: As a participant in the OETZ TROPHY, you have the right at any time to information about your stored personal data, their origin and recipients and the purpose of the data processing, as well as the right to correction, data transfer, objection, restriction of processing and blocking or deletion of incorrect or inadmissibly processed data.
datenschutz.s3Text: Your personal data is protected by appropriate organisational and technical precautions. These precautions relate in particular to protection against unauthorised, illegal or accidental access, processing, loss, use and manipulation.
datenschutz.s4Text: We will not process the data provided to us for purposes other than what is necessary for your participation in the OETZ TROPHY or purposes covered by your consent. This does not include the use for statistical purposes, provided that the data provided has been anonymised.
datenschutz.s5Text: Your personal data will be processed by us and, under certain circumstances, by third parties. We share your data (in particular name, gender, age, nationality, club/association, placement, photos and video recordings) with online and print media, clubs/associations and other persons who have an interest in the OETZ TROPHY. To operate the website and the online registration we also use the following processors: Stripe (payment processing — card details are handled exclusively by Stripe and never reach our servers), Neon (database hosting of registration data, servers located in Frankfurt, EU), Vercel (website hosting), Cloudflare (Turnstile bot protection on the registration form, which processes your IP address and browser signals) and Resend (delivery of the registration confirmation email). Data processing agreements pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR are in place with these providers.
datenschutz.s6Text: We strive to ensure that data breaches are identified at an early stage and, should you be affected, reported to you or the competent supervisory authority, indicating the respective categories of data affected.
datenschutz.s7Text: We will not retain your personal data for longer than is necessary to fulfil our contractual or legal obligations and to defend against any liability claims. Online registration data for the OETZ TROPHY will be deleted or anonymised no later than 12 months after the event.
datenschutz.s8Text: Our website only uses cookies that are necessary for the operation of the site, unless you give us further permission. Our website uses Google Analytics with the extension 'anonymizeIp' to ensure anonymisation of the IP address.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These participant terms summarize the registration commitments for the OETZ TROPHY race weekend. Operational details may be updated by the organiser before race day.
terms.eligibilityText: Registration is for paddlers who are at least 18 years old on race day and have the skill, fitness, and judgement required for advanced whitewater.
terms.rulesText: Participants must follow the official AWP kayak rules, the event briefing, all safety instructions, and the required equipment rules at all times.
terms.paymentText: A start place is secured only after the registration form has been submitted and payment has been completed through Stripe.
terms.dataText: Participant data is processed for event organisation. Photos, video, names, nationality, and results may be used for event reporting according to the privacy policy.
terms.reviewNote: These terms should be reviewed by the organiser before registration opens.

oetzTrophy.label: The Race
oetzTrophy.title: OETZ TROPHY
oetzTrophy.intro: The OETZ TROPHY is one of the hardest kayak races in the world. On the Ötztaler Ache (whitewater class V), the world's best paddlers compete head to head. No open entry: only the fastest 40 men and 15 women from the qualifying heats will be allowed to compete in the race.
oetzTrophy.courseText: The race course covers the most demanding sections of the Ötztaler Ache. Class V whitewater with technical passages, powerful hydraulics and fast currents. The course demands experience, technique, and the willingness to push your limits. Only those who know and respect the river stand a chance here.
oetzTrophy.rule1: Participation is only possible after successful qualification on Friday.
oetzTrophy.rule2: All participants must have proven experience in class V whitewater.
oetzTrophy.rule3: Full safety equipment is mandatory: helmet, PFD, spray skirt, throw bag.
oetzTrophy.rule4: Instructions from safety personnel must be followed at all times.
oetzTrophy.rule5: Acceptance of the terms & conditions and privacy policy at bib number distribution.

boaterX.label: Kayak Cross
boaterX.title: Kayak Cross
boaterX.intro: Following the qualifying heats on Friday morning, in which the fastest 40 men and 15 women qualify for the main competition on Saturday, the Kayak Cross will take place on the slalom course in Oetz. Only those who have not qualified for the main competition will be allowed to participate in this event. The number of participants in the Kayak Cross is limited to 32 men and 16 women. So it's definitely worth giving it your all in the qualifiers.
boaterX.formatText: Four paddlers start simultaneously on a set course. The first two advance, round after round, until only four finalists remain. Pure excitement for spectators and athletes alike. Fast decisions, close duels, full commitment.
boaterX.rule1: Qualification is open for all paddlers with whitewater experience (min. class IV).
boaterX.rule3: Four paddlers per heat: the first two advance to the next round.
boaterX.rule4: Intentional body contact and obstruction of other paddlers leads to disqualification.

kajakfestival.label: Festival
kajakfestival.title: Kayak Festival
kajakfestival.intro: The Ötztal Kayak Festival is the heart of the weekend. For four days, paddlers from across Europe gather in Oetz to paddle, celebrate and connect. Beyond the races, there are demo boats, film screenings, workshops and live music.
kajakfestival.day1Desc: Opening of the Kayak Festival. Arrivals, campsite setup, first community gathering. Welcome party in the evening.
kajakfestival.day2Desc: Qualifying heats in the morning; Kayak Cross on the slalom course in the afternoon. Demo boats from sponsors. Film screenings and live music in the evening.
kajakfestival.day3Desc: OETZ TROPHY: the main race (qualification required). Award ceremony and evening programme.
kajakfestival.day4Desc: Free paddling, community runs on the Ötztaler Ache. Group farewell paddle and departures.
kajakfestival.locationText: The festival takes place in Oetz in the Ötztal valley, Tyrol. Camping is available directly at the festival grounds. For accommodation, we recommend the Ötztal Tourism portal. From Innsbruck, it's approximately 45 minutes by car.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: The photo and video gallery from past years will be available soon. In the meantime, follow us on Instagram for the latest shots.

results.title: Results
results.description: Results from the OETZ TROPHY and Kayak Cross will be published here after the race weekend.

registration.title: Registration
registration.intro: Register for the OETZ TROPHY race weekend. Friday morning's qualifying heats decide it all: the fastest 40 men and 15 women race the OETZ TROPHY on Saturday; the next 32 men and 16 women race the Kayak Cross on Friday afternoon. Open to all paddlers with whitewater experience (min. class IV). The registration fee secures your start position.
registration.formIntro: Use the same email address you want attached to payment and race communication.
registration.requiredNote: All fields and confirmations are required.
registration.ageConfirmation: I confirm that I will be over 18 years old on the day of the race.
registration.previewNotice: Form preview only. Registration opens on {opens}.
registration.closedText: Registration for the OETZ TROPHY race weekend 2026 opens on {opens}. Check back then!
registration.successRaceText: Your registration for the OETZ TROPHY race weekend 2026 has been received and payment confirmed. You will receive a confirmation email plus a separate payment receipt from Stripe. See you on the Ötztaler Ache!
registration.testBannerBody: This is the staging site. Pay with Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242, any future expiry date and any 3-digit CVC. Registrations made here are test data and will be deleted before launch.
registration.turnstileNotice: This form is protected by Cloudflare Turnstile.
registration.alreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered and paid.
registration.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — please wait a few minutes and try again.

programm.title: Programme
programm.intro: Everything you need for your visit to the Ötztal Kayak Festival and the OETZ TROPHY: schedule, meeting points and important places around Oetz.
programm.mapComingSoon: The map with all important places is coming soon.
programm.mapConsent: This map is loaded from Google Maps, which transfers data to Google. See our [privacy policy](/en/datenschutz) for details.
